items.example: My morning routine starts at 6 a.m.
I set my alarm clock for 5:30 every morning.
He always snoozes the alarm and gets up late.
She rushes to the bus stop every morning.
He sometimes skips breakfast when he is late.
She prepares a packed lunch the night before.

items.meaning: hành trình đi làm mỗi ngày
items.example: His daily commute takes about 30 minutes.
The roads are very busy during rush hour.
They take a short break at 10 a.m.
He works overtime on Fridays.
She always finishes her work before the deadline.
After dinner, the family does household chores together.
She tidies up her room every Sunday.

items.meaning: đồ tạp hóa, thực phẩm mua sắm
items.example: He buys groceries at the supermarket after work.
She catches up with friends on weekends.
He unwinds by watching TV after work.
What does your daily schedule look like?
Having a good routine helps you stay organized.
They have lunch together at noon.
She never stays up past midnight.
Farmers often start work at dawn.
The children come home at dusk.
She prefers to exercise during the daytime.
He takes a short nap after lunch.
In her spare time, she paints and reads.
